heading: Commissioned officers: original appointment; limitation
label: 12204 Commissioned officers: original appointment; limitation
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)594(a)50:941(c) (less 1st 21 words).§ 217(c), .July 9, 1952, ch. 60866 Stat. 487594(b)50:941(c) (1st 21 words).In subsection (a), the words “unless * * * he was formerly” are substituted for the words “has not held an appointment as”. The words “or any component thereof” are omitted as surplusage.

children.text: he was formerly a commissioned officer of an armed force; or
such an appointment is recommended by a board of officers convened by the Secretary concerned.

children.label: b
children.text: This section does not apply to adjutants general and assistant adjutants general of the several States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia.
